Localization.Description: The NTLM hash or TGT of a CA server account was obtained using coerced authentication. This data can then be used to compromise the CA server and further develop the attack.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} obtained the NTLM hash of an account of CA server {src.host} using coerced authentication on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} obtained the TGT of an account of CA server {src.host} using coerced authentication on host {event_src.host}
